calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim (15-006)
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy Shearer Esq., Assistant District Attorney, Telpehone (415) 553-9706, appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. Court makes the followng ruling:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim

Granted. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Amy Shearer; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca (15-006)
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Amy Shearer of the State of California Office of the District Attorney (415-553-9706) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

Stipulation to judge pro tem signed by plaintiff counsel.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice of Motion and Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. No Opposition filed. Responses to be Served by July 16, 2018. Notice by moving party. Written order is signed and filed.

Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
